results.check_summary: Plurality and high-confidence evidence agree on the interleaved quadratic and alternating streams.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: quadratic odd stream and alternating even stream.

results.check_summary: Plurality supports the six-phase continuation across the full prefix.
The growing-block continuation with next step 19 has the strongest complete-prefix support among competing block hypotheses.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with increasing block starts, steps, and lengths.

results.check_summary: Plurality supports the residue-class phase continuation, though identification is weak.
Plurality selects this phase-interleaved continuation; evidence remains low-confidence.
results.rule_summary: Periodic affine or polynomial phase updates.

results.check_summary: Multiple high-confidence proposals agree on the three-stream interleave, including x -> -2x - 1.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of periodic, polynomial, and affine streams.

results.check_summary: Plurality supports the growing arithmetic-block continuation, but confidence is limited.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial starts and steps.

results.check_summary: All evidence agrees: odd terms decrement by 1 and even terms decrement by 4.
Plurality supports the residue-class interleaving continuation, with substantial uncertainty.
High-confidence evidence agrees on intervening decrements of 5 and rising positive jumps.
results.rule_summary: Periodic difference rule with linearly rising positive jumps.

results.check_summary: Plurality and repeated critic proposals agree on the three-stream continuation.
High-confidence plurality identifies the next block start as 189 with step -17.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial starts and linearly changing negative steps.
